## `com.daml.ledger.client.binding.encoding.InvariantApply`

- Introduced: `2.10.2`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/bindings-scala_2.13/2.10.3/com/daml/ledger/client/binding/encoding/InvariantApply.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait InvariantApply[F[_]] extends InvariantFunctor[F]
```

**Summary**

A variant of Apply that generalizes with Divide. Instead of lifting functions, it lifts an isomorphism:

## `com.daml.ledger.client.binding.encoding.LfTypeEncoding`

- Introduced: `2.10.2`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/bindings-scala_2.13/2.10.3/com/daml/ledger/client/binding/encoding/LfTypeEncoding.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait LfTypeEncoding extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

A backend for accumulating well-typed information about Daml-LF ADTs (records, variants, and templates) into encodings of those ADTs.

<a id="type-com-daml-ledger-client-binding-encoding-valueprimitiveencoding"></a>

## `com.daml.ledger.client.binding.encoding.ValuePrimitiveEncoding`

- Introduced: `2.10.2`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/bindings-scala_2.13/2.10.3/com/daml/ledger/client/binding/encoding/ValuePrimitiveEncoding.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait ValuePrimitiveEncoding[TC[_]] extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

Core instances of a typeclass (or other type) that relate all cases of the com.daml.ledger.api.v1.value.Value sum type to the Primitive types. All other instances, such as those for record, sum, and template types, are derived from these ones, which thus form the "axioms" of any typeclass relating gRPC values to custom Daml data types built upon Scala datatypes.
